  "claims": [
    "California spends almost $19 billion on purchasing and contracts annually.",
    "The state's procurement policies have not been updated since 2007.",
    "California's existing procurement practices may contribute to human trafficking and forced labor.",
    "Legislation can align California law with federal standards to prevent human trafficking in procurement.",
    "The new legislation provides clear guidance for companies on preventing trafficking in their supply chains.",
    "AB 381 creates clear definitions of human trafficking and forced labor.",
